mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bpm_process_definition_info (id, process_definition_id, model_id, model_type, category, icon, description, form_type, form_id, form_conf, form_fields, form_custom_create_path, form_custom_view_path, simple_model, sort, visible, start_user_ids, start_dept_ids, manager_user_ids, allow_cancel_running_process, allow_withdraw_task, process_id_rule, auto_approval_type, title_setting, summary_setting, process_before_trigger_setting, process_after_trigger_setting, task_before_trigger_setting, task_after_trigger_setting, print_template_setting, create_by,create_by_name,create_time) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{processDefinitionId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelType, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{category, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{icon, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{formType, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{formId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{formConf, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{formFields, jdbcType=CLOB,typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, #{formCustomCreatePath, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{formCustomViewPath, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{simpleModel, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{sort, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{visible, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{startUserIds, jdbcType=VARCHAR,typeHandler=com.yy.common.flowable.handler.LongListTypeHandler}, #{startDeptIds, jdbcType=VARCHAR,typeHandler=com.yy.common.flowable.handler.LongListTypeHandler}, #{managerUserIds, jdbcType=VARCHAR,typeHandler=com.yy.common.flowable.handler.LongListTypeHandler}, #{allowCancelRunningProcess, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{allowWithdrawTask, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{processIdRule, jdbcType=VARCHAR,typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, #{autoApprovalType, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{titleSetting, jdbcType=VARCHAR,typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, #{summarySetting, jdbcType=VARCHAR,typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, #{processBeforeTriggerSetting, jdbcType=VARCHAR,typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, #{processAfterTriggerSetting, jdbcType=VARCHAR,typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, #{taskBeforeTriggerSetting, jdbcType=VARCHAR,typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, #{taskAfterTriggerSetting, jdbcType=VARCHAR,typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, #{printTemplateSetting, jdbcType=VARCHAR,typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, #{loginUserId}, #{loginUserName}, #{now})
mapper.select:
select id, process_definition_id, model_id, model_type, category, icon, description, form_type, form_id, form_conf, form_fields, form_custom_create_path, form_custom_view_path, simple_model, sort, visible, start_user_ids, start_dept_ids, manager_user_ids, allow_cancel_running_process, allow_withdraw_task, process_id_rule, auto_approval_type, title_setting, summary_setting, process_before_trigger_setting, process_after_trigger_setting, task_before_trigger_setting, task_after_trigger_setting, print_template_setting, create_by, create_by_name, create_time, update_by, update_by_name, update_time from bpm_process_definition_info where process_definition_id in
#{item}
